app.name: Vibecodr Upload Assistant
app.short_description: Import and publish vibecoded creations from Codex and ChatGPT into vibecodr.
app.long_description: This app helps creators ingest project files, validate metadata, compile drafts, and publish runnable artifacts to vibecodr.

test_prompts.prompt: Import my codex_v1 package and show draft status.
test_prompts.expected_result: Operation created and draft capsuleId returned.
Compile and publish statuses returned with artifact URL.

safety.data_handling_summary: No raw secrets logged, file payloads validated, strict path policy enforced.
safety.abuse_controls: Rate limiting, idempotency, auth checks, operation audit logs.
